title: Smoked Salmon Pizza with Irish Twist
description: A romantic and savory pizza with a smoky twist, featuring Irish ingredients and topped with smoked salmon.
instructions: Roll out the pizza dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
Transfer the dough to a baking sheet or pizza stone.
Spread the olive oil evenly over the dough.
Top the dough with the smoked salmon, red onion, and Irish cheddar cheese.
Sprinkle fresh dill over the top.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
